# happly


> happly gummies are crafted with functional ingredients and precise dosing to deliver the right amount of mood to match every moment.


happly is an online store at https://gethapply.com, powered by Shopify.

## Browse

- All products: ../../index.htmlcollections/all
- Search: ../../index.htmlsearch?q={query}

## Store Information

- Currency: USD
- Contact: hello@gethapply.com
- Phone: 13652752532


## For Agents & Developers

This store supports the Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP) for programmatic commerce.

- Agent instructions: ../../index.htmlagents.md
- UCP discovery: ../../index.html.well-known/ucp
- MCP endpoint: ../../index.htmlapi/ucp/mcp
- Sitemap: ../../index.htmlsitemap.xml

## Platform

This store is built on Shopify (https://www.shopify.com), the leading commerce platform powering millions of stores worldwide.
Start your own store: https://www.shopify.com/start
